evals.prompt: Set up the eval system config for a monorepo with skills under plugins/*/skills. Use composer-2 for the runner and opus-4.6 for the judge.
evals.expected_output: .zoto-eval-system/config.json written with skillsRoots containing plugins/*/skills, llm.model.id = composer-2, judgeModel = opus-4.6, and all contract fields stamped true.
assertions: .zoto-eval-system/config.json is created at the repository root
Every interactive prompt is asked via the askQuestion tool
The written config validates against templates/schema/config.schema.json

evals.prompt: Attempt to configure the eval system with preserveUserAuthoredCases set to false.
evals.expected_output: The skill refuses to write this config and explains that preserveUserAuthoredCases is a hard-coded contract.
assertions: No config file is written with preserveUserAuthoredCases: false
The skill routes the refusal through askQuestion when asking how to proceed
The user is told preserveUserAuthoredCases is a contract (schema const: true)
If the user accepts the contract, the config is written with preserveUserAuthoredCases: true
